privacy_policy: Aggregated term counts only. No student names, schools, teacher names, IDs, project abstracts, certificates, row samples, or original spreadsheets are included.

methodology.source: local private workbook summaries generated during cleaning
methodology.counting_method: Counts award-related terms detected in workbook cells and estimates candidate records from nonempty rows.
limitations: Counts are helper signals, not official award totals.
Some workbooks contain headers, notes, merged cells, regional subsets, finalist stages, or internal annotations.
Use official public notices for external numbers and keep this file for internal planning and retrieval.
